name: Liberland
description:
The Free Republic of Liberland is a sovereign state on the Danube River between Serbia and Croatia.

Liberland is the freest country in the world and the first meritocratic republic governed on blockchain. Liberland Merits (LLMs) represent each citizen’s stake in the country.

With sovereign land, no bureaucracy, and voluntary taxes, Liberland uses Bitcoin alongside the Liberland Dollar (LLD) as currencies of choice.

Liberland’s motto: To Live and Let Live

name: Prospera
description:
Próspera creates startup zones with unique laws, regulations and taxes.

The Prósperian Ethos
These principles guide the vision and development of Próspera as a beacon of freedom and prosperity.
Create Value

We honor those who build. Productivity is our purpose. To create is to live fully.
Live Free

We reject force. We live by reason and choose our path with integrity and courage.
Trade Voluntarily

All exchange must be free, consensual, and earned. Value for value—always.
Protect Property

What you build is yours. Property is sacred—a reflection of the self.
Earn, Don't Take

No entitlements. No handouts. We give and take only what is earned.
Pursue Happiness

Joy through purpose is a moral life. We do not sacrifice, we achieve.
Technological progress is Good

We push beyond the limits—of knowledge, productivity, and what's possible.

name: Network School
description:
The Network School is a frontier community for techno-optimists. Our members include remote workers, digital nomads, online creators, personal trainers, self-improvers, event organizers, and engineers of all stripes. You should apply if you want to build yourself up while also building a startup society that bootstraps other startup societies.

If you're accepted to the Network School, membership starts at $1500/month with roommates, and includes everything from meals to gym to accommodations. We think of it as society-as-a-service.

And you might be our next member. If you want to join us, please do apply!

name: Zuzalu
description:
"What if cultures or tribes that have formed online with their own goals and values could materialize offline, and new physical places could grow due to intention rather than random chance?"

Zuzalu is a public good community, a pop-up city, a playground for cross-pollination experiments, a debating ground for exciting topics, a testing space for Ethereum-based technology, and a hub for futuristic-sounding disciplines such as longevity, synthetic biology, network states, and more. One thing we can guarantee is that Zuzalu is a magical community where real innovation and transformations happen. You will get future-pilled here

https://zuzalu.notion.site/Zuzalu-s-Mission-and-Vision-28d0dfaf60c043ab8bb1943f493a225f

name: Superpower Europa
description:
The EU can be the #1 superpower if we unify our economies,  markets and foreign policy while fixing eurosclerosis and demographics.
Superpower Europa aims to achieve it with a propaganda team boosting kingmaker parties for maximum leverage.
National Eurosclerosis
Our people’s compassion is hijacked by the green-communist ideoligion, and our pride is hijacked by small regional nationalism, both making us weak. However, our compassion and pride can be used to Make Europe Great.

The member states happily overregulate, overspend, overpolice and overmigrate themselves into irrelevance even without the EU. Eurosclerosis is not inherent to the EU, but a result of its member states. Fixing politics in member states will fix the EU and make it a superpower it is meant to be.
Kingmakers
Politics, parties and election campaigns of member states are largely similar. Most parties only campaign for elections, without a dedicated full time team. 
An European propaganda network will boost aligned “Kingmaker” parties in member states. 
As elections are always happening across Europe, the network will focus on pro-EU campaigns, using economies of scale and experience in cooperation with aligned parties to put them in power.

Values 
We are consistent about core values, but flexible on others. While further goals are desirable, we won't bicker about the details on the path to Superpower Europa.

- Truly unified market, free flow of Europeans, goods and capital
- Stop unrestricted third world immigration
- EU command similar to NATO command
- Pro growth, pro energy
- Unified foreign policy
- English as the common language of the West
- National self governance enabling innovation through competition for talent and capital

name: Other Groups
description: I just wanna be a part of this man, i havent yet joined any specific group.

name: Radical Longevity
description: We don't plan to die. A community for radical life extensionists, from supplement optimizers and biohackers to SENS believers and longevity investors. Aging is a disease worth curing.
